query:
-- 1. Apollo credit usage by day for last 14 days
SELECT DATE(createdAt) as day, COUNT(*) as reveals, SUM(creditsUsed) as credits
FROM apolloCreditLog
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt)
ORDER BY day DESC;

SELECT DATE(createdAt) as day, COUNT(*) as reveals, SUM(creditsUsed) as credits
FROM apolloCreditLog
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt)
